title: Neons Passive Generators
description: Adds New blocks used for passive power generation
body:
This mod adds a variety of means for generating power passively.

This mod currently incudes a solar panel and a thermal generator.

Both of these blocks have custom models.

These generators make RF aka Forge Energy and i have tested them with thermal Expansion and Mekanism with full compatibility. this mod will work with any other tech mods that use the FE system.

This mod also includes A universal energy meter that can measure the energy stored in any FE block.

Each item has crafting recipes shown below

**Thermal Generator Crafting**

![Thermal gen Crafting](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/958144986824728576/1020132379337175083/unknown.png)

**Solar Panel Crafting**

![Solar Panel Crafing](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/958144986824728576/1020132500682588221/unknown.png)

**Energy Meter Crafting**

![Energy Meter Crafting](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/958144986824728576/1020132443702964284/unknown.png)

**Solar Panel :**

The Solar panel will generate 30 FE per tick if exposed to the sky while it is day and can store up to 10,000 FE. This block will send energy to the block below it.

![Solar Panel](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/958144986824728576/1020131039223484447/unknown.png)

**Thermal Generator :**

The thermal generator will output energy when a "Hot block" is below it, amount generated is different for each block as shown below. This block can store 50,000 FE. This block will send energy to the block above it.

![Thermal Generator](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/958144986824728576/1020131546973343756/unknown.png)

LAVA / FLOWING LAVA : / LAVA COULDRON = 50 FE per tick

Fire = 20 FE per tick

Soul Fire = 30 FE per tick

Camp fire = 10 FE per tick

Soul Campfire = 20 FE per tick

Magma Block = 8 FE per tick

_Note there are 20 ticks per second by default_

This mod also has its own Creative inventory tab.

Feel free to use in any modpacks.

You can suggest more generators in the comments but it must :

-   Be a passive generator
-   Not need a GUI (Graphical User Interface)
-   Can't have an animation
